Description:
ALIASES:

USAGE:

　/sea GLA 20-30 "La Noscea"

　La Noscea between levels 20
　and 30.)

　<UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>JA<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>EN<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>FR<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>DE<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

>>Example:
　/sea GLA 20-30 "La Noscea"
　(Searches for all gladiators in
　La Noscea between levels 20
　and 30.)

ALIASES:
　/lookingforparty, /lfp
USAGE:

→Set your online status to Looking for Party/Online.

　　Party.

Multiple classes/jobs─or none at all─may be specified.

USAGE:
　/systemsoundsspeaker [subcommand]

→Adjust system volume settings for wireless controller speakers (for PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, and Windows®(DX11)).

>>Subcommands:
　<UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>[volume number]<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
　　Set system speaker sounds to the specified volume level.
　　Levels available: 0-100.

Toggles system speaker sounds on and off when no subcommand is specified.

USAGE:
　/systemsoundsspeaker [subcommand]

→Adjust system volume settings for wireless controller speakers (for PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, and Windows®).

>>Subcommands:
　<UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>[volume number]<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
　　Set system speaker sounds to the specified volume level.
　　Levels available: 0-100.

Toggles system speaker sounds on and off when no subcommand is specified.
